commit.message:
feat(config): add Float64, FilePath, DirPath, Prefix, and Summary helpers (#354)

- Float64/MustFloat64: read float environment variables
- FilePath/DirPath: validate file/directory existence from env vars
- Prefix type: namespace config reads with a key prefix
- Summary: generate masked config dump for startup logging
- 20 new tests covering all additions

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cache): add hit/miss stats and eviction callbacks (#353)

- Add Stats() returning hits, misses, size, and hit rate
- Add ResetStats() to zero out counters
- Add OnEvict callback in Config, called on LRU eviction, TTL expiry, and deletion
- Atomic hit/miss tracking for thread safety
- Add 7 new tests covering stats tracking, reset, and eviction callbacks

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(httpclient): add BaseURL and Bearer token auth options (#352)

- Add WithBaseURL() to prepend a base URL to path-only requests (starting with /)
- Add WithBearerToken() for static Bearer auth
- Add WithBearerTokenFunc() for dynamic/refreshable Bearer tokens
- resolveURL handles trailing slash normalization
- Add 6 new tests covering base URL resolution and auth

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix fatal V8 crash when passing undefined as App options (#1232)

* Initial plan

* Fix issue #1102: add missing check in readOptionsObject to throw exception instead of fatal error

Co-authored-by: uNetworkingAB <110806833+uNetworkingAB@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(metrics): add HTTP middleware for automatic request metrics (#350)

- Add HTTPMiddleware() that auto-registers and tracks http_requests_total
  (counter with method/status labels) and http_request_duration_seconds
  (histogram with default buckets)
- Add 4 new tests covering request counting, duration recording,
  multi-status tracking, and status capturer behavior

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(health): add runtime checkers and configurable timeout handler (#349)

- Add MemoryChecker(maxBytes) to detect heap allocation exceeding threshold
- Add GoroutineChecker(maxGoroutines) to detect goroutine leaks
- Add HandlerWithTimeout() for configurable checker timeout (vs hardcoded 5s)
- Add 4 new tests for runtime checkers

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sorting): add multi-field sorting helpers with SQL generation (#348)

Add a new sorting package for parsing, validating, and generating
SQL ORDER BY clauses from query parameters:

- Parse() with single (?sort=name&order=asc) and multi-field
  (?sort=name:asc,created_at:desc) formats
- Allowlist-based field validation to prevent SQL injection
- Case-insensitive matching with canonical name output
- OrderByClause()/OrderBySQL() for safe SQL generation
- MaxFields limit to bound multi-sort complexity
- HasField() for checking if a specific field is in the sort

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add cursor pagination and Link header helpers (#347)

- Add CursorResult[T] and CursorPaginated() for cursor-based pagination
- Add SetLinkHeader() for RFC 5988 Link headers (first/prev/next/last)
- Add 8 new tests covering link generation, cursor responses, and edge cases

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add Validator builder, Hostname, and HexColor (#346)

- Add Validator builder with Check/CheckIf chaining for ergonomic struct validation
- Add Hostname validator (RFC 952/1123 with 253 char limit)
- Add HexColor validator (#RGB and #RRGGBB formats)
- Add comprehensive tests for all new features

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(ratelimit): add Remaining and Reset methods (#345)

- Add Remaining(key) to inspect available tokens without consuming
- Add Reset(key) to clear a bucket and restore full capacity
- Both methods are thread-safe and handle unknown keys gracefully
- Add 5 new tests covering inspection, refill, and reset

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: document UWS_HTTP_MAX_HEADERS_SIZE and UWS_HTTP_MAX_HEADERS_COUNT (#1230)

* Initial plan

* docs: document UWS_HTTP_MAX_HEADERS_SIZE and UWS_HTTP_MAX_HEADERS_COUNT in README

Co-authored-by: uNetworkingAB <110806833+uNetworkingAB@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(retry): add DoWithResult generic and PermanentError (#344)

- Add DoWithResult[T] for retrying operations that return values
- Add Permanent() error wrapper to signal non-retryable errors
- Add IsPermanent() helper for error classification
- Update Do() to also respect PermanentError
- Add comprehensive tests for all new features

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(circuitbreaker): add context-aware execution and metrics snapshot (#343)

- Add ExecuteWithContext() that respects context cancellation without
  counting cancelled calls as failures
- Add Snapshot type with JSON tags for metrics export and health reporting
- Add comprehensive tests for both new features

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix maxLifetime: 240 causing immediate WebSocket disconnection (#1231)

* Initial plan

* Fix maxLifetime: 240 causing immediate WebSocket disconnection

Cap maxLifetime at 239 in AppWrapper.h to prevent uSockets modulo
wraparound bug (240 % 240 == current timestamp => instant timeout).
Also clamp to non-negative values. Update TypeScript docs to document
valid range as 0 | 1-239.

Co-authored-by: uNetworkingAB <110806833+uNetworkingAB@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: uNetworkingAB <110806833+uNetworkingAB@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(middleware): add request ID validation and comprehensive tests (#342)

- Add RequestIDFromContext() for direct context extraction
- Reject oversized request IDs (>128 chars) to prevent abuse
- Add comprehensive test suite covering generation, reuse, validation,
  context propagation, and uniqueness

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(logging): add structured logging helpers with slog (#341)

Add a new logging package providing opinionated slog helpers:

- New() constructor with functional options (format, level, writer, source, attrs)
- ParseLevel() for string-to-slog.Level conversion
- Context-based logger propagation (WithContext/FromContext/With)
- Common attribute builders (RequestID, UserID, Service, Version, Component, TraceID, Err)

Co-authored-by: devaloi <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore: 移除 LICENSE 準據法及聯絡方式段落

依據著作權人決定，移除中英文版之「準據法/Governing Law」及
「授權需求聯絡/licensing inquiries」段落。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: LICENSE 補齊業界規範條款（9 項改善）

修正 review 發現的 2 CRITICAL + 5 MEDIUM + 2 LOW 問題：

[CRITICAL]
- 新增「有限授權」條款：明確授予檢視、執行、AI 參考之權利
- 新增「GitHub 平台使用」條款：解決公開 repo 與版權保留之矛盾

[MEDIUM]
- 明確定義「允許」與「不允許」之使用範圍
- 新增專利/第三方智財權免責聲明
- 新增「終止」條款（違規自動終止 + 法律救濟權）
- 新增「貢獻者條款」（著作權讓與，與 CONTRIBUTING.md 對應）
- 新增「禁止背書」條款

[LOW]
- 新增準據法：中華民國法律 + 臺北地方法院管轄
- 新增著作權標示保留要求（不得移除/修改）

README.md: 授權摘要同步更新

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update lib/Cargo.toml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: doorbird-rs
repository.description: Wrapper Library for the Doorbird API in Rust

commit.message:
license: 變更授權為 All Rights Reserved（版權所有）

- LICENSE: 中英雙語 All Rights Reserved 取代 CC BY-SA 4.0
  - 明確禁止未經書面授權的重製、修改、散布
  - 限定用途：搭配 AI 編程助手進行綠界 API 串接開發參考
  - 含免責聲明（中英文）
- SKILL.md: license 欄位改為 All-Rights-Reserved
- README.md: 授權說明、FAQ、目錄結構同步更新
- CONTRIBUTING.md: 貢獻者著作權讓與條款同步更新

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: LICENSE 中英文版完整對齊 CC BY-SA 4.0 官方 deed

中文版：
- 補上「公眾領域/例外或限制」免遵守條款段落
- 補上「未提供保證」段落（形象權、隱私權、著作人格權）

英文版：
- 移除 copyright 行多餘的 'and ECPay Skill Contributors'
- 補上不可撤回條款 (irrevocability clause)
- 修正連接號 hyphen (-) 為 em dash (—) 對齊官方格式
- 補上 public domain / exceptions 段落
- 補上 No warranties 段落

來源：
  https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/deed.zh-hant
  https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: LICENSE 中文版對齊 CC BY-SA 4.0 官方繁體中文 deed 用語

- 補上「不可撤回」條款：只要遵守授權條款，授權人不能撤回使用自由
- 對齊官方用語：「且為任何目的，包含商業性質之使用」「惟需遵照」
  「貢獻物」「增設」「本已許可的作為」等
來源：https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/deed.zh-hant

fix: 修正 README 中 ECPG 與站內付 2.0 的關係描述

ECPG（EC Payment Gateway）是綠界線上金流服務的大傘，
涵蓋站內付 2.0、綁卡扣款、幕後授權等多項服務。
站內付 2.0 只是 ECPG 的其中一項服務，兩者不可劃等號。

修正 3 處：
- 涵蓋服務表格：「站內付 2.0（ECPG）」→「ECPG 線上金流（含站內付 2.0、綁卡扣款）」
- 指南索引：「站內付 2.0 ECPG」→「ECPG 線上金流：站內付 2.0」
- HTTP 協議表格：「ECPG」→「ECPG 線上金流」加強辨識度

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

  copilot_fix, copilot_review, copilot_test, copilot_list_models,

- Autonomous agent loop with read_file, write_file, bash, git tools

- Works with Codex CLI, Claude Code, Gemini CLI

commit.message:
docs: README 新手友善強化 — 目錄/術語/安裝連結/互動示範/測試帳號

6 項改善：
1. 新增可點擊目錄（Table of Contents）— 553+ 行文件快速定位
2. 前置需求表格加入各 AI 工具官方安裝連結
3. 快速開始區新增「核心術語速查」（5 個必知術語 + 連結 guides/00 完整表）
4. 新增「互動示範」— 展示安裝後實際 AI 互動體驗
5. 涵蓋服務表格展開縮寫（AIO→All-In-One、ECPG、B2C、B2B）
6. 測試環境段落擴充 — 列出 4 組共用 MerchantID + SimulatePaid 提示

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: code review 修正 — Swift timing-safe 完善 + C++ 安全性 + 格式修正

CRITICAL:
- Swift constantTimeEqual(): 移除 early-return length guard，改用
  constant-time 長度檢查（避免長度比較 timing leak）

HIGH:
- C++ callback handler: find() 結果先檢查 end() 再 dereference，
  防止 key 不存在時 undefined behavior

MEDIUM:
- C callback: 補上遺漏的 <string.h> include（strlen 依賴）
- C++ httpPost: Content-Type 加註 AES-JSON 協定說明
- Java logging: 分離 SLF4J/Logback 推薦與安全規則警告

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: 12 語言規範全面強化 — 修復安全漏洞 + 新增日誌與監控

CRITICAL fixes:
- Swift: 修正 timing-safe 比較實作（移除錯誤的 HMAC 方式，改用 XOR constant-time）
- Swift: 修正 force unwrap as! → guard let as?
- 全部 12 語言新增「日誌與監控」章節（含 NEVER log HashKey/HashIV 警告）

HIGH fixes:
- Node.js: 新增 ESM (import/export) 語法說明
- C: 新增 Callback Handler 範例（libmicrohttpd）
- C++: 新增 Callback Handler 範例（cpp-httplib）
- Ruby: 新增 RBS 型別簽名（Ruby 3.1+）
- Ruby: 新增 RSpec 測試範例

MEDIUM fixes:
- Python: retry/backoff 策略、env 啟動驗證
- Node.js: timingSafeEqual ERR_CRYPTO_TIMING_SAFE_EQUAL_LENGTH 說明
- TypeScript: ESM tsconfig 備註、zod env 驗證範例
- Go: http.Client goroutine-safe 說明
- Java: record 替代範例（Java 17+）
- C#: nullable reference types 備註
- Kotlin: toByteArray(Charsets.UTF_8) charset 明確指定、coroutine 說明
- Rust: reqwest::Client Send+Sync 安全說明
- C: curl_global_init/cleanup 範例
- C++: httpPost() response handling 完整實作

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Add dogfood skill for testing and feedback with issue taxonomy

commit.message:
feat(config): add MustStringSlice for required comma-separated env vars (#340)

MustStringSlice panics if the environment variable is unset or empty.
Intended for application startup.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add CIDR notation validator (#339)

CIDR validates that a string is valid CIDR notation using net.ParseCIDR.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: update README with latest utilities and descriptions (#338)

Update package descriptions to reflect recent additions: BasicAuth,
IP/IPv4, JSON, Base64, Unique, Map, Compact, Contains, NotModified,
SeeOther, ParseIDList, MustAddr, and more.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Contains for generic slice membership (#337)

Contains reports whether an item is present in a slice.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add NotModified and SeeOther helpers (#336)

NotModified sends a 304 response for ETag/cache workflows.
SeeOther sends a 303 redirect, used after POST to redirect to GET.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add IP and IPv4 address validators (#335)

IP validates any IPv4/IPv6 address. IPv4 validates strictly IPv4.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Compact for removing zero-value elements (#334)

Compact removes zero-value elements from a slice, returning a new
slice with only non-zero values in their original order.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add Base64 for RFC 4648 validation (#333)

Base64 validates that a string is valid standard base64 encoding.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: update GitHub Actions for Node.js 24 compatibility

- Add FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 environment variable
- Update Node.js version in build job from 18 to 22
- Prepare for Node.js 20 deprecation (June 2nd, 2026)
- Actions already support Node.js 24:
  * actions/checkout@v4
  * actions/upload-artifact@v4
  * actions/download-artifact@v4
  * google-github-actions/auth@v2
  * google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2
  * hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: browser-side HTML parsing via CF Worker (no server scraping needed)

When NEXT_PUBLIC_CF_PROXY_URL + NEXT_PUBLIC_CF_PROXY_SECRET are set:
- Browser fetches HTML directly from CF Worker (CORS-enabled)
- DOMParser extracts title/price/images from HTML in the browser
  (__NEXT_DATA__ → JSON-LD → og:meta → CDN img tags, in order)
- Saves via /api/admin/scrape-meesho (same endpoint as bookmarklet)
- Falls back to server-side /api/admin/fetch-meesho if CF proxy not configured

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: veedu
repository.description: A meesho reseller website

commit.message:
feat(sanitize): add Map for generic slice transformation (#332)

Map applies a function to each element and returns the transformed
slice. Supports cross-type mapping (e.g., []int → []string).

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add BasicAuth for HTTP basic authentication (#331)

BasicAuth enforces HTTP Basic Authentication with constant-time
credential comparison using SHA-256 hashing to prevent timing attacks.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add ParseIDList for comma-separated UUID lists (#330)

ParseIDList parses a comma-separated query parameter as a list of
UUIDs, returning an error if any token is invalid.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add MustAddr for required address env vars (#329)

MustAddr panics if the environment variable is unset or not a valid
host:port address. Intended for application startup.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add JSON validator (#328)

JSON validates that a string is syntactically valid JSON using
encoding/json.Valid.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: self-hosted Cloudflare Worker proxy for Meesho fetching

Instead of paying for ScraperAPI, route through our own free CF Worker.
- cf-worker/worker.js: Cloudflare Worker that proxies Meesho requests
  (Cloudflare IPs not blocked by Akamai, free 100k req/day)
- fetch-meesho route: try CF proxy first (if CF_PROXY_URL + CF_PROXY_SECRET set)

Setup: deploy cf-worker/worker.js to Cloudflare Workers (free),
then add CF_PROXY_URL and CF_PROXY_SECRET to Vercel env vars.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Unique for generic duplicate removal (#327)

Unique returns a new slice with duplicates removed, preserving
the order of first occurrence.

RequireTrue and RequireFalse are fatal boolean assertions that stop
the test immediately on failure, complementing the existing Assert*
boolean helpers.
